# Skywhale Airways

> A scroll-driven WebGL microsite and AI Film Club short by Kris Krug and Suzy
> Easton.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://skywhaleairways.com/) - the Skywhale Airways journey, boarding
  pass, Decade Weather, festival cut film embed, and Duty-Free catalog.
- [Colophon](https://skywhaleairways.com/about.html) - methodology, tools, and
  creative notes.
- [Press Kit](https://skywhaleairways.com/press.html) - programmer snapshot,
  artistic thesis, credits, runtime, key art, stills, rights note, and
  festival/web cut links for programmers.

## Project Notes

Skywhale Airways is the project and festival brand for *I AM NOMAD* (a
psychedelic airport for time travelers). The canonical project image is the **I AM NOMAD** Time
Traveller poster. The primary public film is the 59s festival cut on YouTube
(Unlisted) at `youtu.be/3xmfwiwdhm8`; the preserved 53s web cut is also on
YouTube (Unlisted) at `youtu.be/nvKMmuzQNDs`. The public site embeds the
festival cut with `youtube-nocookie`.
